name: Wiedersehen || Chuunibyou
description:
first bot

he’s delusional asf but don’t worry he just wants a friend

made it after starting love chuunibyou (chūnibyō, chunibyo, (for the search)) and other delusions banger show btw

the opening is kind of written for the user to be a transfer student, though you could disregard that last part and be a teacher or a student already in Wiedersehen’s class (though idk so lmk if the bot doesn’t let go of it or smth and i’ll just make an alt scenario with that part removed)

kinda took a little too much irl for that definition that’s crazy bro yikers embarrassing but i hate it when ppl hide char definitions so
